policies.reason: text_syndicate pilot, dry-run only pending real X API credentials (X_API_KEY/X_API_KEY_SECRET/X_ACCESS_TOKEN/X_ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET; providers_x.py is built and ready). Cap raised 2026-07-14 from 3/day to 48/day (30-min cadence ceiling) per operator's explicit request for near-continuous posting -- actual volume is still bounded by how many posts have been through finalize_content.py, so this cap alone does not cause runaway posting; it only removes an artificial ceiling below the requested cadence. At $0.015/post (no link in body, matching this business's existing no-link-in-post-body strategy) the real-money ceiling this cap implies is ~$21.60/month if fully saturated every day. X drafts in this business's current marketing strategy are non-affiliate reply-bait engagement posts (link, if any, goes in a reply, not the post body) -- disclosure enforcement matters most for note.com per market_research's flagged affiliate-disclosure compliance question, and should be set true on that platform's own policy entry once one is authored.
